title: Yuanyang Tea (Hong Kong Style Tea Brewed with Coffee)

ingredients.name: black tea leaves (to make 4 1/2 cups (about 1 L) black tea)
5-8 tablespoons sugar ((depends on your preference for sweetness))

steps.instruction: First brew your black tea leaves in 4 1/2 cups of water. While the tea is steeping, brew your coffee with your preferred method. Make sure both the tea and coffee are fairly strong!
When the coffee and tea are ready, combine them in a large bowl or carafe. Stir the sugar into the coffee/tea mixture and add the half and half. Stir thoroughly and serve!
This makes 8-10 servings depending on mug size. You can also serve this tea chilled or with ice!
